github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits with emojis: ✨ feat, 🐛 fix, 📝 docs, 🎨 style, ♻️ refactor, ⚡ perf, ✅ test, 🔧 chore, 🚀 build, 👷 ci, 🔒 security. Write a short title (≤72 chars) and, if multiple changes exist, a detailed body explaining what changed and why, grouping related changes in bullet points. Format commits as <emoji> <type>(scope): <title> and optionally add a body with bullets.
